name: Dinmo
description: Dinmo — Composable CDP platform for data teams to build and activate customer audiences without SQL.

seo.title: Dinmo — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Dinmo: Dinmo — Composable CDP platform for data teams to build and activate customer audiences without SQL.

when_to_use: CDP audience building without SQL for marketing team
Composable data activation from warehouse to ad platforms
Reverse ETL for syncing segments to CRM tools
No-code audience segmentation for growth experiments
Cross-channel activation pipeline from data warehouse

pros: Composable CDP runs on your warehouse (Snowflake/BQ)
No-SQL audience builder for non-technical users
Transparent pricing compared to enterprise CDPs
cons: Requires existing warehouse to be useful
Fewer prebuilt destinations than Census or Hightouch
Not a product analytics tool proper
review.verdict: A modern composable CDP for European teams wanting warehouse-native activation without enterprise cost.
review.best_for: European data teams on Snowflake or BigQuery wanting no-SQL audience building for marketing.
review.not_for: Teams without a warehouse, product analytics use cases, or enterprise-reference buyers.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
